comment: 30yo female, father with primary hyperparathyroidism (age 35) + pituitary prolactinoma (age 42), paternal aunt with pancreatic neuroendocrine tumor (age 48). Three MEN1-spectrum tumors across two generations meeting classic MEN1 criteria. Engine routes to PreventionPlan (after Agent F Wave 2 lands): standard = pre-test counseling + germline MEN1 panel + age-appropriate surveillance (PTH/Ca q1y from age 5, pituitary MRI q3y, GEP-NET surveillance); alternative = empirical multi-organ surveillance.
